warnings: The professor's name appears in multiple forms (石峰, ShiFeng, SHI Feng). All have been added as aliases.
The school name appears in both Chinese and English. The Chinese version is used for the primary school_name field.
The discipline appears in both Chinese and English. The Chinese version is used for the primary discipline field.
Research interests are listed in both Chinese and English. Both versions have been added as separate research topics.
The education entry 'Student in the Phys. Dept. of Beijing Universit, Received B.Sc.' is incomplete. The degree '理学学士' was extracted from the Chinese text.
The employment entry '1977.4-现在北京理工大学计算机学院' has a start date (1977.4) that precedes the earlier employment end date (1996.4). The raw text has been preserved.
The 'Teacher' title for the current employment is derived from the English description 'Teacher in School of Computer Science & Technology of Beijing Institute of Technology'.

The 'Member of BIT Academic Committee' and 'Vice-chairman of Info. & Elec. Divisions of BIT Academy' are listed under '所获荣誉:(Awards)' but appear to be academic service roles. They have been placed in the awards list as per the source section heading.
Publication venues include publisher names (e.g., 'Elsevier') and conference names. These have been added as organizations with appropriate types.
The publication list includes indexing labels (SCI, EI). These have not been extracted as separate fields.
